executives.name: Jay Jiang Yu
executives.background: Mr. Yu is the Founder and Executive Chairman of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. He is a serial entrepreneur and has over 16 years of experience in capital markets and corporate restructuring. He has served as a consultant to several public companies and has been involved in numerous private and public financings.
